problem.title: NDT throughput and accuracy trade-off on the second public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: Which NDT dogfooding profile should stay as the current default on a deeper HDL-400 public reference set while keeping faster and denser alternatives comparable?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory sliced from the HDL-400 pose trace export

variants.label: Balanced local map
variants.intent: Keep the current repository default as the baseline trade-off.

variants.label: Fast coarse map
variants.intent: Use a coarser map and fewer points to increase FPS.

variants.label: Dense local map
variants.intent: Use denser scans and a larger map budget for a stronger refinement path.
